metadata.description: The portable ship → babysit PR pipeline: clean, verify, review, commit, open a PR, and drive it to a green review approval. Self-contained and installable on any SKILL.md-compatible agent.

plugins.name: ship-kit
plugins.description: /ship orchestrates simplify → verify → code-review → smart-commit → branch hygiene → PR → babysit → reflect; /babysit drives a GitHub PR to a fresh APPROVED + CI-green + mergeable state. Bundles simplify/verify/code-review so it runs without relying on pre-installed skills.
